title: viola × sedunensis
intro: Viola × sedunensis, also known as the hybrid viola or garden pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola x intermedia, a type of flowering plant in the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola × sedunensis include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of consuming Viola × sedunensis are numerous, including its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Viola × sedunensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
